description: CompositeDisruptionMode defines how individual entities within a composite pod group can be disrupted. Exactly one mode must be set.

all.description: AllCompositeDisruptionMode means that children of a CompositePodGroup can only be disrupted or preempted together.

single.description: SingleCompositeDisruptionMode means that individual children of a CompositePodGroup can be disrupted or preempted independently.
